name: Voodoo Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the ginger and slice it thinly.
2. In a 1-quart saucepan, combine brown sugar, ginger, peppercorns, allspice, cinnamon sticks, and water.
3. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
4. Strain out the spices and chill the syrup.
5. If making ahead, set aside until ready to serve.
6. To prepare the punch, place the ice block (2 quarts) in a punch bowl.
7. Add chilled syrup, rum, vodka, orange juice, and pineapple juice. Taste and adjust with more juices if desired.
8. Poke the stem of each flower through the center of a lemon slice; float the slices on top of the punch.
9. Serve each drink over ice cubes.
